request.rawPrompt: 把天赋抽取的触发键从 F4 改成 F5
request.goal: Change the talent draw trigger key from F4 to F5 while preserving all existing behavior.

functional: Rebind the existing talent draw activation key from F4 to F5.
Keep the existing weighted draw, modal selection, and effect application behavior unchanged.
Preserve the existing one-trigger-entry interaction model.

typed.summary: Replace the current hotkey binding F4 with F5 for the existing talent draw trigger.
Preserve the current weighted-pool candidate generation, single confirmed choice, modal UI, and same-feature effect application.
invariants: Weighted pool candidate source remains unchanged
Same selection skeleton remains in place

interactions: Player presses F5 to invoke the existing talent selection flow.
outputs: Updated trigger binding parameter set to F5

hostConstraints: Must preserve unspecified existing behavior for feature 'talent_draw_demo'.
Keep source-backed selection_pool profile semantics unchanged except triggerKey.
Use a single trigger entry only.
Keep weighted pool candidate source and single-confirm selection behavior.
nonFunctional: Preserve existing runtime/UI behavior except for the activation key.

flow.triggerSummary: Press F5 to start the unchanged talent draw and selection flow.
sequence: Existing weighted pool draw logic runs unchanged
Existing selection modal displays candidates unchanged

expectedBindings.summary: Existing key-binding entry point updates its configured hotkey from F4 to F5.
Existing selection modal remains bound to the unchanged selection flow.

feedbackNeeds: Existing modal opens from F5 instead of F4

acceptanceInvariants.summary: The only behavioral change is the activation key changing from F4 to F5.
The preserved module backbone remains input_trigger, weighted_pool, selection_flow, selection_modal, and effect_application.
Weighted pool sourcing, three displayed candidates, and exactly one confirmed selection remain unchanged.

resolvedAssumptions: F5 is an allowed triggerKey value in the current parameter surface.
The request intends a minimal update to the existing source-backed feature only.
